title: How Declining NAD+ Affects Metabolism and Weight After 40
author: Happy Aging Team
tags: NAD+, metabolism, weight after 40, sirtuins, AMPK, women over 40, cellular energy, NMN, longevity
meta_title: How Declining NAD+ Affects Metabolism and Weight After 40
meta_description: NAD+ powers the metabolic enzymes that regulate fat burning and blood sugar. Learn why declining NAD+ after 40 affects how your body responds to diet and exercise, and what the research supports.
